Summershiloh 2016

FULLY BUBBLED

JIGGLY BUBBLER LIKE NO OTHER

MULTIPLAYER LOBBY

CODE: ----

HOW TO PLAY

💻

MOUSE

Move mouse to aim

Left click to fire

Hold to rapid fire

⌨

KEYBOARD

AD or ←→ to move

SPACE to fire

📱

MOBILE

Drag to move

Tap to fire

• Shoot white bullets at colored bubbles

• Orange glowing = explosive — bursts nearby bubbles

• Small dim = fragile — pops instantly

• Don't let bubbles cross the bottom line!

SCORE: 0
LEVEL 1
0:00

MUSIC
SFX THEME
Opponent
